title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama – chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that plugs Ollama models into LangChain LLM, chat, and embeddings interfaces.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j – Java client
summary: Lightweight Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-rs – Rust client
summary: Async Rust crate wrapping Ollama’s REST API with strong typing and tokio.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenient interactive CLI (written in Go) for chatting and managing Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that brings local Ollama completions inline like GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-chat-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to chat with your notes using any Ollama model privately.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-eval
summary: Small repo benchmarking RAG pipelines backed by Ollama embeddings & generators.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples (CPU & GPU) for easy self-hosting.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag-telegram-bot
summary: Telegram bot that answers questions over your documents using Ollama + RAG.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chat UI with Ollama backend, Markdown rendering, and code highlighting.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration that injects an Ollama4j client bean for Java apps.

title: reddit/r/ollama – model discussions
summary: Active subreddit for sharing custom modelfiles, benchmarks, and troubleshooting tips.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Merged Nixpkgs derivation making Ollama a one-line install on NixOS.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK targeting .NET 6+ with async chat and model management.
